author: Viggo Meesters
description: Open .yxmd workflows and .yxzp packages as read-only summaries with search, source view, and warnings. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Viggo Meesters
manifest.description: Open .yxmd workflows and .yxzp packages as read-only summaries with search, source view, and warnings.
manifest.name: Alteryx Viewer

name: Alteryx Viewer

releases.author: viggomeesters
releases.description:
Initial public release of Alteryx Viewer.

- Read-only .yxmd workflow summaries, tool lists, connections, paths, formulas, warnings, and source view.
- Read-only .yxzp package listing with contained workflow highlighting.
- Synthetic fixtures only; no workflow execution, generation, conversion, or save-back.
